title: T-020 — API: Lab results endpoints (POST/GET /api/technical/lab-results)
prompt: Implement endpoints for lab results per §5.5 + §10.6 + V-TEC-44. POST body: { item_id, work_order_id?, test_type, test_code?, result_value, result_unit, threshold_rlu?, tested_at, lab_provider?, notes? }. result_status auto-set: for test_type='atp_swab' if result_value > threshold_rlu (default 10 from reference_tables.alert_thresholds), then 'fail'; otherwise 'pass'. Other test_types use explicit input. GET filterable by item_id, work_order_id, test_type, result_status. RED tests/api/lab-results.test.ts. Run: `pnpm vitest run tests/api/lab-results.test.ts`.

pipeline_inputs.description: Lab results POST with auto pass/fail for ATP swab + GET with filters.
pipeline_inputs.details: ATP threshold pulled from reference_tables.alert_thresholds where row_key='atp_swab_rlu_max' default 10. If row absent, fallback to 10 and log warning. fail status emits notification (out-of-scope: actual delivery — emit event only).
acceptance_criteria: Given test_type='atp_swab' and result_value=12 with threshold_rlu=10, when POST runs, then result_status='fail' written.
Given test_type='atp_swab' result_value=8 threshold=10, when POST, then result_status='pass'.
Given GET ?test_type=allergen_elisa&result_status=fail, then only matching rows returned.
Given POST without item_id and without work_order_id, when validated, then 422 (at least one required).
test_strategy: RED tests covering V-TEC-44 trigger semantics.
risk_red_lines: Do not call external lab APIs (Phase 2).
